---
title: Visualization!
author: Martin Gleason, MS
date: '2018-01-05'
slug: visualization
categories:
  - Education
  - Data Science
  - R
  - Podcasting
tags:
  - Dorkadia
  - All Comics Considered
  - Stats
  - '#Rstats'
---
![A Visualization From Podcast Data](/images/likesComparisionACCvDork.jpg)
I'm one of the hosts of [All Comics Considered](http://allcomicsconsidered.com). One of our favorite partner shows is [Dorkadia](http://dorkadia.com). Given our overlap in staff, topics, and fans, I thought it would be fun to compare our facebook data. So I did. 

Tomorrow, I'll share the scripts.
